# PHCollectionListType.momentList

**Case**

A group of asset collections of type [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAssetCollectionType/moment].

## Declaration

```swift
case momentList
```

## Discussion

Moment lists include both moment clusters and moment years. Moment clusters appear as “Collections” in the Photos app, grouping individual moments. Years group all moments containing assets created in the same calendar year.

## Constants

- **PHCollectionListType.folder**: A folder containing asset collections of type [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAssetCollectionType/album] or [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAssetCollectionType/smartAlbum].
- **PHCollectionListType.smartFolder**: A smart folder synced to the device from .
